subject: How to set up task dependencies in ProjectFlow?
message: Hi, I'm new to ProjectFlow and I'm trying to set up task dependencies for my software development project. I can see the option to add dependencies but I'm not sure how to make them work properly. When I mark a task as complete, the dependent task doesn't automatically start. Can you help me understand how this feature works?

Hey! Quick question - can I integrate ProjectFlow with our existing Slack workspace? We want to get notifications in Slack when tasks are assigned to our team. Is this something you support out of the box?

subject: Billing inquiry - unexpected charge
message: I noticed an unexpected charge on our last invoice. We were on the Professional plan but got charged for Enterprise features we didn't request or use. Can you please look into this and explain the charges?

subject: URGENT: System performance issues
message: Our team has been experiencing severe performance issues with ProjectFlow over the past 2 hours. Page loads are taking 10-15 seconds, and sometimes the application times out completely. This is impacting our team's productivity significantly. We need immediate assistance.

Hi there! I love using TeamHub for team collaboration, but I was wondering if there's a way to create recurring meetings? We have a weekly team sync every Monday at 10 AM and I'd like to set it up to repeat automatically instead of creating it manually each week.

subject: Refund request for unused licenses
message: We recently downsized our team from 50 to 30 members and now have 20 unused ProjectFlow licenses. We've removed the extra users from our account but were still charged for the full 50 licenses this month. We'd like to request a refund or credit for the unused licenses.

subject: Question about data export capabilities
message: I need to export our project data for an external audit. Can you tell me what formats are available for data export from ProjectFlow and InsightAnalytics? Specifically, I need to know if we can export to CSV, Excel, and PDF formats, and if there are any limitations on the amount of data that can be exported at once.
Is it possible to restrict access to certain projects within ProjectFlow? We have some sensitive projects that should only be visible to specific team members, not the entire organization.

subject: Legal inquiry - data processing agreement
message: Our legal team requires a signed Data Processing Agreement (DPA) before we can proceed with implementing your software. We need to ensure compliance with GDPR and other data protection regulations. Could you please provide us with your standard DPA for review?

subject: Repeated issue - notification not working
message: This is the third time I'm reporting this issue. I'm not receiving email notifications when tasks are assigned to me or when due dates are approaching. I've checked my notification settings and they appear to be configured correctly. This has been happening for the past two weeks and is causing me to miss important deadlines.

This is absolutely unacceptable! I've been trying to access my account for the past hour and keep getting error messages. Your service is down AGAIN and it's causing major problems for our project timeline. I demand immediate action and compensation for the downtime!

subject: Pricing question - enterprise plan features
message: We're considering upgrading to your Enterprise plan but need more details about what features are included. Specifically, we want to know about the advanced analytics capabilities, custom SLA options, dedicated support, and on-premise deployment possibilities. Could you provide a detailed feature comparison between Professional and Enterprise plans?
